title: meliosma laui
intro: Meliosma laui, also known as Lau'i or Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the family Sabiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of meliosine, a compound found in its leaves. The health benefits of Meliosma laui include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially helping to manage symptoms of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Meliosma laui include teas and infusions made from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
